steps.input: Review loan application schema and classify PII vs safe fields
steps.output: Fields classified. PII restricted: SSN, raw_income, home_address. Safe for scoring: debt_to_income_ratio, payment_history, employment_duration.

governance.reason: Schema inspection is read-only. No PII accessed.

steps.input: Generate credit risk score using non-PII fields only
steps.output: Credit risk score: 720. Based on debt_to_income_ratio (0.32), payment_history (98% on-time), employment_duration (4.5 years).

governance.reason: Credit scoring requested. PII fields (SSN, raw_income) blocked by policy. Scoring permitted on approved fields only.
conditions: raw_income field access denied - use debt_to_income_ratio instead

steps.input: Verify no restricted PII fields were accessed during scoring
steps.output: Compliance check passed. 0 restricted field accesses detected. Scoring used only approved fields.

governance.reason: Compliance audit is a read-only validation operation.
